title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Axe India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Axe India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!
